title: Microsoft invests in and partners with OpenAI to support us building beneficial AGI
titleZh: 微软投资并与OpenAI合作，支持我们构建有益的AGI
summary: Microsoft is investing $1 billion in OpenAI to support us building artificial general intelligence (AGI) with widely distributed economic benefits. We’re partnering to develop a hardware and software platform within Microsoft Azure which will scale to AGI. We’ll jointly develop new Azure AI supercomputing technologies,
summaryZh: 微软正在向OpenAI投资10亿美元($ 1 billion) ，以支持我们构建具有广泛分布的经济效益的通用人工智能(AGI)。我们正在合作在Microsoft Azure内开发一个硬件和软件平台，该平台将扩展到AGI。我们将共同开发新的Azure AI超级计算技术，
highlights: Microsoft is investing $1 billion in OpenAI to support us building artificial general intelligence (AGI) with widely distributed economic benefits.
We’re partnering to develop a hardware and software platform within Microsoft Azure which will scale to AGI.

title: Why responsible AI development needs cooperation on safety
titleZh: 为什么负责任的人工智能开发需要在安全方面进行合作
summary: We’ve written a policy research paper identifying four strategies that can be used today to improve the likelihood of long-term industry cooperation on safety norms in AI: communicating risks and benefits, technical collaboration, increased transparency, and incentivizing standards.
